pattern: Each monster has a deadline minute, and sorting deadlines lets a greedy pass count how many you can shoot before one breaches.
hints: Compute the arrival time of each monster as distance divided by speed.
You fire one shot per minute starting at minute zero, so you must eliminate a monster strictly before its arrival time.
Sort arrival times ascending; for each i, if arrival[i] <= i the monster reaches the city before you can fire, so return i; otherwise return n.

edge_inputs.description: two arrive at the same first minute
monster arrives exactly when weapon recharges
fast monster arrives within first minute

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    dist = [rng.randrange(1, 100001) for _ in range(n)]
    speed = [rng.randrange(1, 100001) for _ in range(n)]
    return [dist, speed]
